case_title: KRISTOFFER EDGAR LEON et al. VS. ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUN-18-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU . PLAINTIFF'S KRISTOFFER LEON AND EMILY STEEMERS ARE PRESENT. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEON, KRISTOFFER EDGAR STEEMERS, EMILY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN $1,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,015.00, DEFENDANT WAS A CO-OWNER OF THE SUBJECT PROPERTY AND THEREFORE A JOINT LESSOR. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DIANA KRUZE. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF'S KRISTOFFER LEON & EMILY STEEMERS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL ALICIA M. GAMEZ AND EXECUTOR OF ESTATE, STUART SCHOENMANN. COUNSEL ALICIA M. GAMEZ INDICATED A PRIOR KNOWLEDGE OF JUDGE PRO TEM DIANA KRUZE. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANA KRUZE ACKNOWLEDGED THE PROFESSIONAL ACQUAINTANCE OF COUNSEL ALICIA M. GAMEZ AND AFTER DISCLOSING SAID KNOWLEDGE OF ONE ANOTHER INFORMED ALL PARTIES THAT SHE DID NOT SEE ANY REASON AS TO WHY SHE WOULD NOT BE ABLE TO PRESIDE OVER MATTER UNBIASED AND IMPARTIALLY, BUT OFFERED AN OPPORTUNITY FOR PARTIES TO RE-SCHEDULE OR REASSIGN TO ANOTHER DEPARTMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANA KRUZE ASKED EACH PARTY IF THEY WERE STILL WILLING TO PROCEED AND ALL PARTIES CONFIRMED THEY WERE WILLING TO PROCEED AND HAD NO RESERVATIONS ABOUT SAID DISCLOSURE. RESPONDENT & APPELLANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANA KRUZE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2018 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LEON, KRISTOFFER EDGAR STEEMERS, EMILY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,315.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY LEON, KRISTOFFER EDGAR STEEMERS, EMILY AS TO DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2018 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: GAMEZ, ALICIA M SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR ESTATE OF DONN SCHOENMANN

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF KRISTOFFER LEON AND EMILY STEEMERS ARE PRESENT.
ALICIA M. GAMEZ COUNSEL FOR APPELLANT/DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DON SCHOENMANN IS PRESENT.
APPELLANT/DEFENDANT ESTATE OF DON SCHOENMANN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STUART SCHOENMANN, EXECUTOR.

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

KRISTOFFER LEON, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HIS OWN BEHALF. EMILY STEEMERS, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF, TESTIFIES ON HER OWN BEHALF.

THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT 1 - SIX PAGE DOCUMENT CONSISTING OF TABLE OF CONTENTS, COMMUNICATION LETTER, IMAGE OF A CHECK, STATEMENT OF DESCRIPTION OF SERVICES, AN IMAGE OF A RECEIPT FROM LOWE'S HOME IMPROVEMENT, COPY OF AN E-MAIL, GRC ROOFING INC. ESTIMATE WORK ORDER, ANOTHER COPY OF AN E-MAIL

ESTATE OF DON SCHOENMANN APPELLANT/DEFENDANT, REPRESENTATIVE STUART SCHOENMANN, EXECUTOR, TESTIFIES ON THEIR BEHALF.

THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:

EXHIBIT A - COPY OF E-MAIL
EXHIBIT B - THREE COLOR PHOTOS DEPICTING HARDWOOD FLOOR, WALL/CEILING, CEILING ONLY
EXHIBIT C - TWO-PAGE WORK ORDER ESTIMATE FROM GRC ROOFING INC. & A COPY OF AN E-MAIL ON BACKSIDE OF ROOFING ESTIMATE
EXHIBIT D - NINE PAGE FRONT & BACK COPY OF SFAA RESIDENTIAL TENANCY AGREEMENT
EXHIBIT E - FOUR PAGE FRONT & BACK COPY OF AN E-MAIL CHAIN COMMUNICATION
EXHIBIT F - THREE PAGE DOCUMENT OF A LETTER WITH IMAGES ON BACKSIDE, COPY OF AN E-MAIL INCLUDING A COLOR PHOTO OF SKYLIGHT
EXHIBIT G - ONE PAGE COPY OF AN E-MAIL
EXHIBIT H - ONE PAGE COPY OF WORK ORDER ESTIMATE FROM BLUE SKY SERVICES
EXHIBIT I - TWO PAGE FRONT & BACK COPY OF AN E-MAIL CHAIN COMMUNICATION
EXHIBIT J - THREE PAGE COPY OF AN E-MAIL CHAIN COMMUNICATION FROM LYNN SCHOENMANN
EXHIBIT K - ONE PAGE COPY FRONT SIDE OF A LETTER & BACKSIDE IMAGE OF A CASHIER'S CHECK
EXHIBIT L - FOUR PAGE COPY OF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT FORM FROM CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION OF REALTORS

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT DIANA KRUZE, CLERK G. FELICIANO, NOT REPORTED (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-07-2018 Judgment Entered
